summary: Comprehensive testing of i18n (internationalization) feature for Sonel MPI-530 Interactive Guide. All backend tests passed (21/21). Frontend language switching works perfectly with PL, EN, DE support. Language persists on page reload via localStorage.

issues: Tools description text 'Kalkulator, tabele norm, kody błędów...' appears to remain in Polish when switching to German/English. This is a minor i18n gap - the description under the 'Tools and Calculators' title should be translated.

passed_tests: Backend: /api/functions returns Polish by default (Test Wyłączników Różnicowoprądowych)
Backend: /api/functions?lang=en returns English function names (RCD Testing)
Backend: /api/functions?lang=de returns German function names (RCD-Prüfung)
Backend: /api/functions/rcd?lang=en returns English step-by-step instructions
Backend: /api/functions/rcd?lang=de returns German step-by-step instructions
Backend: /api/faq?lang=pl returns Polish FAQ
Backend: /api/faq?lang=en returns English FAQ
Backend: /api/faq?lang=de returns German FAQ
Backend: /api/tools/error-codes?lang=pl returns Polish error descriptions
Backend: /api/tools/error-codes?lang=en returns English error descriptions
Backend: /api/tools/error-codes?lang=de returns German error descriptions
Backend: /api/quiz/questions?lang=pl returns Polish quiz questions
Backend: /api/quiz/questions?lang=en returns English quiz questions
Backend: /api/quiz/questions?lang=de returns German quiz questions
Backend: /api/tools/checklists?lang=en returns English checklist items
Backend: /api/tools/checklists?lang=de returns German checklist items
Backend: /api/search?q=insulation&lang=en works for English search
Backend: /api/search?q=isolation&lang=de works for German search
Backend: Invalid lang parameter (lang=fr) rejected with 422 validation error
Frontend: Language switcher visible with globe icon + current lang code (PL/EN/DE)
Frontend: Clicking language toggle opens dropdown with all 3 options
Frontend: Switch to EN: hero title changes to 'INTERACTIVE GUIDE'
Frontend: Switch to DE: hero title changes to 'INTERAKTIVE ANLEITUNG'
Frontend: Switch back to PL: everything returns to Polish
Frontend: Language persists on page reload (localStorage key 'sonel-lang')
Frontend: RCD function in EN mode shows English step-by-step instructions
Frontend: RCD function steps include 'Preparation', 'Cable connection', etc. in English
Frontend: Safety notes display in selected language
Frontend: Tools tab labels display in English (Zs Calculator, Cable sizing, etc.)
Frontend: Checklist names in English (RCD Test, Insulation measurement, etc.)
Frontend: Quiz intro screen shows translated content
Frontend: Sidebar navigation shows translated function names
Frontend: No runtime errors on any page in any language
action_items: Minor: Consider translating the Tools section description text which currently stays in Polish
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - All translations are in /app/backend/translations.py and frontend i18n JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n feature fully implemented and tested. Language switcher in header works with PL, EN, DE. All backend endpoints support ?lang= parameter. Frontend uses LanguageProvider context and localStorage for persistence. All function names, steps, safety notes, FAQ, error codes, quiz questions, and checklists are properly translated. Only minor gap: Tools section description text isn't translated.
mocked_api_note: ALL translations are hardcoded in translations.py (EN/DE) and server.py (PL default) - this is by design
